_instructions: Host this file alongside taskpane.html. All fields are optional — defaults are used for anything omitted.
_trustedArcSealers_help: ARC overrides (treating a gateway-relayed email that fails SPF/DKIM/DMARC at the final hop as legitimate) only apply when the receiving server reports arc=pass AND the relay that sealed the chain is recognized. A built-in list covers Microsoft, Google, Mimecast, Proofpoint, Barracuda. Add your own gateway domains here (suffix match, e.g. 'gateway.example.com'). Use ['*'] to trust any sealer (arc=pass only — not recommended).
